HomePage.heading: Start from a lean form-ready SaaS baseline.
HomePage.description: This template ships with a reusable contact workflow, typed validation, and a small shadcn/ui surface that can scale into customer-facing intake flows without extra client state or provider setup.
HomePage.feature1: Typed Zod schema for request validation
HomePage.feature2: Reusable UI primitives for cards, inputs, textareas, and buttons
HomePage.feature3: React Hook Form wiring isolated to a single client component boundary

ContactForm.title: Contact us
ContactForm.description: Fill in the form and we will get back to you as soon as possible.
ContactForm.name: Name
ContactForm.successDescription: Thank you for reaching out. We will get back to you soon.
ContactForm.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
